notableEvents.label: Moisés Ballesteros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Moisés Ballesteros grounds into a force out, pitcher Connor Phillips to catcher Tyler Stephenson. Seiya Suzuki out at home.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Michael Busch.

notableEvents.label: Michael Conforto pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Michael Conforto called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Amaya reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Amaya reaches on a fielding error by left fielder TJ Friedl.

notableEvents.label: Michael Busch walk-off
notableEvents.detail: Michael Busch singles on a ground ball to center fielder Dane Myers. Dansby Swanson scores.
